Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 1 0 0}I apologize for asking you to come at such short notice.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}Truth be told... I'd like to ask you a favor.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}{f 4 23 0 202 1 25 25}I've been searching for someone of exceptional ability.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}So if you have the time, do you mind taking on several of my requests?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}On special occasions, I may require you to escort me on certain excursions.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}Of course, you will be aptly rewarded for completing the request.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}{f 4 23 0 202 0 25 25}I look forward to your cooperation and hope to see you demonstrate your capability.[n]{f 1 1}
